title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Solara Active Pharma

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Solara Active Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Solara Active Pharma in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Solara Active Pharma:
Solara Active Pharma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma!
